prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜2025年约第59名，2026年约第67名，近年排名略有后移但仍属全国百强；2023年声誉评价中性/混合，无重大负 面舆情；抖音热度排名第68位，评价为一般，短视频曝光量中等；未见明显投档断档记录；安全科学与工程A+（全国顶尖）、测绘科学与技术A-、土木工程A-， 矿业工程为传统王牌，与招生专业中的安全科学与工程类、测绘类、土木类等直接对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、计算机类、电子信息类为高热推荐专业， 社会热度高；安全科学与工程类对应A+学科，报考吸引力强；土木类社会热度分化观望。本省2026年考生总数约48000人（不确定），较2025年物理类30457人明显增加，竞争加剧；中国矿业大学位于江苏徐州，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜；该校在青海省招生占比极小（2024年约0.4%），地域偏好影响有 限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024年基准位次4455名、2026年物理类计划较2024年理科缩减约16.7%（缩招推高位次数字）、2026年本省考生总数明显增加（竞争加剧）、学校层次 稳定且优势学科突出（安全A+吸引报考）等因素，预计2026年最低位次较2024年略有后移；预测最低位次约4560名，区间4360–4760名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum ranking for science subjects was approximately 5174 → 5330 → 4752 → 4455, showing a fluctuating but forward-moving trend (decreasing ranking numbers). The 2024 baseline is about 4455. The provincial science enrollment plan from 2021 to 2024 was 63, 64, 64, and 60 students respectively, with a reduction of 4 students in 2024 compared to 2023. The 2026 physics category plan is 50 students, a reduction of about 16.7% compared to the 2024 science plan of 60 students, indicating a significant enrollment contraction and intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 59th in 2025 and 67th in 2026, with a slight decline in recent years but still among the national top 100. The 2023 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 68th, rated as average, with moderate short video exposure. No significant enrollment gaps recorded. Safety Science and Engineering A+ (top in the country), Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, and Mining Engineering is a traditional flagship, directly corresponding to enrollment majors such as Safety Science and Engineering, Surveying and Mapping, and Civil Engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electrical Engineering and Automation, Computer Science, and Electronic Information are highly recommended majors with high social popularity. Safety Science and Engineering corresponds to an A+ discipline, attracting strong application interest. Civil Engineering has mixed social popularity and is under observation. The total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 48,000 (uncertain), a significant increase from 30,457 in the 2025 physics category, intensifying competition. China University of Mining and Technology is located in Xuzhou, Jiangsu, not a local university, so there is no local enrollment preference. The university's enrollment proportion in Qinghai is very small (about 0.4% in 2024), so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2024 baseline ranking of 4455, the 2026 physics category enrollment plan reduction of about 16.7% compared to 2024 science (enrollment contraction pushing ranking numbers higher), the significant increase in total candidates in the province for 2026 (intensified competition), stable school level and prominent advantageous disciplines (Safety A+ attracting applications), it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be slightly lower than in 2024. The predicted minimum ranking is about 4560, with a range of 4360–4760.

- Computer Science
- Electronic Information
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Safety Science and Engineering

- Mechanical Engineering
- Remote Sensing Science and Technology
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4360–4760, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice (Safety Science and Engineering A+ discipline offers high cost-performance). Tier 1 majors (Electrical, Computer, Electronic Information) can be used as a reach. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4360), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>4760), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as a safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 720 → 665 → 694 → 884, showing an overall backward trend (ranking numbers increasing), with a baseline of about 884 in 2024. The provincial liberal arts enrollment plan was 2 students each year from 2021 to 2023, increasing to 4 in 2024. In 2026, the history category plan is 9 students, a 125% increase compared to the 2024 liberal arts plan of 4, representing a significant expansion, leading to a noticeable reduction in competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 59th in 2025, about 67th in 2026, with a slight decline in recent years but still among the top 100 nationally. In 2023, reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking 68th, rated as average, with moderate short video exposure. Liberal arts majors mainly include Chinese Language and Literature, Business Administration, and Public Administration, which have low correlation with CUMT's advantageous disciplines (Safety A+, Surveying A-, Civil Engineering A-), resulting in relatively limited appeal for liberal arts.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language and Literature has high social popularity, with clear advantages for civil service exams. Business Administration has divided social popularity and is watched with caution. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is about 48,000 (uncertain), a significant increase from 17,212 history category candidates in 2025, intensifying competition. China University of Mining and Technology is located in Xuzhou, Jiangsu, not a local university, so there is no local enrollment preference. The significant expansion of liberal arts enrollment may attract more candidates to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2024 baseline ranking of 884, the 125% expansion of history category enrollment in 2026 compared to 2024 liberal arts (significant expansion pushing ranking numbers down), and the increase in total provincial candidates (intensifying competition), the expansion effect outweighs the candidate increase effect. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to 2024. Predicted minimum ranking approximately 910, with a range of 860–960.
